name: rustifi
description: UniFi network MCP server for Codex — read-only access to connected clients, devices, WiFi configs, alarms, and site health.

interface.shortDescription: Query UniFi network clients, devices, and health
interface.longDescription: Read-only MCP server for Ubiquiti UniFi networks. Exposes connected wireless and wired clients, network devices (APs, switches, gateways), WiFi configurations (SSIDs, bands, security), site health, active alarms, recent events, controller sysinfo, and authenticated user info — all via a single unified MCP tool.
defaultPrompt: Who is currently connected to my network? Show me all clients with their IP addresses.
Are all my UniFi devices online? Show me access point and switch status.
List my WiFi network configurations including SSID, band, and security settings.
